entity.summary: Fully on-chain options and volatility-yield exchange protocol using request-for-quote auctions for covered calls and cash-secured puts with collateralized settlement and upfront option premiums.
entity.notes: HEI models the current Rysk, Rysk Finance, and Rysk V12 trading surfaces as one exchange entity. Current documentation states that the protocol is live on HyperEVM and executes covered-call and cash-secured-put trades through an on-chain RFQ auction; earlier vault designs are not modeled as separate exchanges.

evidence.title: Rysk Finance current protocol documentation
evidence.notes: Current first-party documentation describes Rysk V12 as a live HyperEVM protocol for fully on-chain covered calls and cash-secured puts, with RFQ auctions, upfront premiums, collateralized settlement, and no external custody of collateral.

evidence.title: Rysk V12 options volume metrics
evidence.notes: Independent metrics report current non-zero options premium and notional trading volume for Rysk V12, corroborating active exchange usage.
